home.subtitle: Calculate your 4×1000 easily
home.quickInfo: The GMF (4×1000) is a tax in Colombia on financial movements. Rate: $4 for every $1,000.

information.title: What is 4×1000 (GMF)?
information.description:
The 4×1000 (GMF) is a tax applied to certain financial transactions in Colombia.
For every $1,000 moved, $4 is charged. It generally applies to bank withdrawals and transfers, with some exemptions.

autoDiscount.title: Automatic deduction
autoDiscount.description: Banks deduct it automatically at the moment of the transaction.

exemptAccount.title: Exempt account
exemptAccount.description: You can mark an account as exempt, with a monthly cap defined by regulation.

transactionTypes.title: Transaction types
transactionTypes.description: It usually applies to transfers, withdrawals, and other movements within the financial system.

origin.title: Origin
origin.description: It was created in 1998 as a temporary measure (2×1000) and remained with adjustments.

calc.invalidAmountMessage: Please enter a valid amount greater than 0.
calc.shareMessage: Hi! My 4x1000 calculation is: Amount: {{amount}} | Tax: {{tax}} | Total to transfer: {{total}}. Calculated with 4xMil App.
calc.copiedMessage: The total was copied to the clipboard.
